sheet_name: แบบขยายระบบสุขาภิบาลห้องน้ำ
view_title: แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลห้องน้ำ 2 ( ท่อประปาเดินใต้พื้น )

elements.description: Ø2"AVC ( ชนิดต่ออกด้านข้างผนัง ) -- side-outlet-type vent cap, at the top of the detail, wall-mounted
Ø3/4"CW cold-water supply pipe near the top, feeding down toward the fixture cluster
Ø1 1/2"V vent pipe near the lavatory/basin fixture
Ø2"W waste pipe from the fixture cluster
Ø2"FD floor drain near the WC/fixture area
Ø4"S soil pipe from the WC (circle fixture symbol) at bottom, routed to the right toward the wall/stack
second Ø3/4"CW label near the bottom-right of the detail, likely the branch feeding the WC/fixtures

sibling_files: บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_01_หน้า52_wc1_plan.json
warnings: This is a small-scale (1:50) schematic underfloor-piping detail of upper-floor ห้องน้ำ 2, explicitly noted '( ท่อประปาเดินใต้พื้น )' -- cold-water piping routed UNDER the floor for this bathroom, matching house #2's equivalent bathroom-detail convention. grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true -- not on the building's structural plan grid.
This is one of two side-by-side bathroom-detail views on this sheet (SN-07); the other (ห้องน้ำ 1, ground floor) is captured in the sibling file.

Content and pipe-size callouts (Ø3/4"CW, Ø1 1/2"V, Ø2"W, Ø2"FD, Ø4"S) are broadly similar to house #2's equivalent bathroom-plan inset on its page39, adjusted for this room's own dimensions (2.10 x 2.00 m here vs 2.70 x 1.80 m on house #2).
Exact fixture layout and precise pipe routing paths are only partially legible at this resolution -- positions are best-effort, not measured coordinates; flagged for zoom-review.
